PDFDocumentProperties object

PDFDocumentProperties is one of the PDF Builder objects and is derived from PDFModel. It gets or sets the properties of the PDF document.

Properties

ApplicationStringGets or sets the creator of the PDF document.
AuthorStringGets or sets the author of the PDF document.
TitleStringGets or sets the title of the PDF document.

Events

ConstructorImmediately before the Open event occurs in the window.
DestructorImmediately after the Close event occurs in the window.

Functions

ClassNameStringReturns the name assigned to the control.
PostEventBooleanAdds an event to the end of the message queue for the control.
